_setup: Ersetze alle {{PLACEHOLDER}}-Werte vor dem ersten Einsatz:
{{NTFY_URL}}      — ntfy.sh-Topic-URL für Benachrichtigungen (oder Hook komplett entfernen)

hooks.command:
bash -c 'input=$(cat); last_input=$(cat /tmp/claude-last-user-input.txt 2>/dev/null || echo 0); now=$(date +%s); elapsed=$((now - last_input)); [ "$elapsed" -lt 120 ] && exit 0; msg=$(jq -r ".message // "Claude notification"" 2>/dev/null <<< "$input") || msg="Claude notification"; latest=$(ls -t ~/.claude/projects/$(echo {{PROJECT_ROOT}} | tr / -)/*.jsonl 2>/dev/null | head -1); last_q=$(tail -500 "$latest" | jq -r "select(.type=="assistant") | .message.content[]? | select(.type=="text") | .text" 2>/dev/null | grep -E "\?" | tail -1 | sed "s/^ *//"); [ -n "$last_q" ] && title="$last_q" || title=$(printf "%s" "$msg" | cut -c1-60); branch=$(git -C {{PROJECT_ROOT}} rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); commit=$(git -C {{PROJECT_ROOT}} log --oneline -1 2>/dev/null); session=$(jq -r ".session_id // """ 2>/dev/null <<< "$input" | cut -c1-8); ts=$(date +"%H:%M"); body="$msg"; [ -n "$branch" ] && body="$body
branch: $branch | $commit"; [ -f /tmp/claude-current-file.txt ] && body="$body
file: $(cat /tmp/claude-current-file.txt)"; [ -n "$session" ] && body="$body
session: $session | $ts"; curl -s -X POST {{NTFY_URL}} -H "Content-Type: text/plain" -H "Title: $title" -d "$(echo -e "$body")"'

jq -r 'if .tool_name == "Read" then .tool_input.file_path elif .tool_name == "Glob" then .tool_input.pattern elif .tool_name == "Grep" then (.tool_input.path // ".") else "" end' 2>/dev/null | { read -r f; [ -n "$f" ] && echo "$f" > /tmp/claude-current-file.txt; } || true

input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '(^|[|&;[:space:]])git commit( |$)'; then echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PreToolUse\",\"permissionDecision\":\"deny\",\"permissionDecisionReason\":\"[GIT] Direct git commit is blocked. Use the git-commit-master agent: say 'commit these changes'.\"}}" ; fi
